'''dathumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabblement|rabblement]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabblement|rabblement]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dathumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæthimith|dæthimith]] || [[word:dæthimij|dæthimij]] || [[word:dæthimish|dæthimish]] || [[word:dæthimi|dæthimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathuthumuth|dathuthumuth]] || [[word:dathuthumuj|dathuthumuj]] || [[word:dathuthumush|dathuthumush]] || [[word:dathuthumu|dathuthumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathumuth|dathumuth]] || [[word:dathumuj|dathumuj]] || [[word:dathumush|dathumush]] || [[word:dathumu|dathumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathufmuth|dathufmuth]] || [[word:dathufmuj|dathufmuj]] || [[word:dathufmush|dathufmush]] || [[word:dathufmuf|dathufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dathumuthu|dathumuthu]] || [[word:dathumuju|dathumuju]] || [[word:dathumushu|dathumushu]] || [[word:dathumuku|dathumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dathumuth|dathumuth]] || [[word:dathumuj|dathumuj]] || [[word:dathumush|dathumush]] || [[word:dathumu|dathumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dathumuthul|dathumuthul]] || [[word:dathumujul|dathumujul]] || [[word:dathumushul|dathumushul]] || [[word:dathumukul|dathumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dathumuthuthu|dathumuthuthu]] || [[word:dathumujuju|dathumujuju]] || [[word:dathumushushu|dathumushushu]] || [[word:dathumuku|dathumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dathumuthun|dathumuthun]] || [[word:dathumujun|dathumujun]] || [[word:dathumushun|dathumushun]] || [[word:dathumukun|dathumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dathumuthuoro|dathumuthuoro]] || [[word:dathumujuoro|dathumujuoro]] || [[word:dathumushuoro|dathumushuoro]] || [[word:dathumukuoro|dathumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
